summary: Lead accepts M6-ACCESSIBILITY-CORE-FLOWS-001 after independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT, metadata reconciliation, real child-thread closure, and lead integration gates. The implementation hardens Alpha core flows for keyboard reachability, focus visibility, screen-reader labels/descriptions, non-color state evidence, reduced-motion handling, map keyboard navigation, command/save live statuses, scenario/policy/event/encyclopedia/victory surfaces, and viewport overflow checks while preserving read-model/command DTO boundaries.

tests_run.result: Passed; existing Vite chunk-size warning remains.
Passed; existing Storybook/Vite chunk-size and plugin timing warnings remain.
Passed 11 Chromium tests including M6 Alpha accessibility core flow and viewport overflow checks.
Passed architecture check, determinism canaries including M6 Alpha hash 260f46c3, root Vitest 40 files / 305 tests, and web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests.
Passed Prettier format check, ESLint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary check.

Reviewed changed paths against task allowed_paths/forbidden_paths; no forbidden paths, package manifests, lockfile, Electron, sim-core, sim-ai, content-source, CI, roadmap, gate, or release artifact changes.

decisions: Accept QA ACCEPT and proceed to PR/CI integration.
Treat the corrected 20260627 writer REVIEW handoff path as the authoritative writer handoff; the stale 20260628 writer-handoff reference was metadata-only and has been reconciled.
Keep accessibility work Alpha-bounded; do not claim final M7/M8 accessibility completion or assistive-technology certification.
No new production dependency is introduced.
Preserve read-model / command DTO boundaries; UI does not store full WorldState or directly mutate authoritative simulation state.
Do not add telemetry, accounts, hidden network calls, Electron IPC, server/multiplayer behavior, release/commercial choices, or manual node battle work.
risks: PR CI must pass before the task can be CLOSED.
Manual screen-reader certification remains outside this Alpha core-flow task; automated role/name/live-region checks and recorded evidence are accepted for M6 scope.
Existing Vite/Storybook chunk-size warnings remain pre-existing non-blocking warnings.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge on pass, sync main, write CLOSED checkpoint, and continue to the next READY M6 task.
